methodsAttempted.query: site:uni-wuerzburg.de KI ChatGPT generative KI Universität Würzburg Studium Prüfung Datenschutz
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the central KI in Studium und Lehre pages, an official Rechenzentrum AI tools page, a JMU working draft guideline PDF, and news or faculty-level leads.
Located an official Rechenzentrum-hosted legal memo on ChatGPT and examination law plus an internal exam-management page lead.
Found the Tools und Services page and a faculty campus article; the faculty article was not used for university-wide policy claims.
Fetched the JMU July 2025 working draft guideline PDF and the older Rechenzentrum IT-law ChatGPT memo. The draft guideline was used only as draft guidance evidence, not as a final binding policy.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located central JMU teaching pages on KI in Studium und Lehre, a Rechenzentrum page for AI-supported tools, and a July 2025 working draft guideline for AI in teaching and examinations. No final central binding AI policy was found in the public official sources reviewed; claims are scoped to guidance, draft guideline status, tool-use responsibilities, privacy cautions, and source status.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Tools und Services der JMU - Lehre
Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie

artifacts.claimText: Public official sources reviewed for JMU Würzburg showed central AI guidance pages and a July 2025 working draft guideline, but no final central binding AI policy was identified.

citation.citationTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie

artifacts.claimText: JMU's July 2025 working draft AI guideline says generative AI contributions may be used but must be clearly marked, included in the independence declaration, and documented so students' own work remains visible.

citation.citationTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie

artifacts.claimText: The JMU Rechenzentrum page enables use of AI systems and lists tool options such as Microsoft Copilot Chat and Adobe Firefly, while stating that responsible use must observe provider, legal, and university requirements.
JMU guidance warns users not to enter personal, sensitive, unpublished personal, or confidential data into AI tools or prompts.
JMU teaching guidance says AI system results should be critically evaluated because generative AI may reproduce bias and can be helpful, faulty, or misleading depending on context.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 9. Juli 2025 20250709 Arbeitsfassung_Leitlinie JMU Umgang mit KI V8.docx ... Die vorliegende Leitlinie dient dazu, einen zukunftsorientierten Rahmen für den Einsatz von KI in Lehre und Prüfungen zu schaffen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The document is a July 2025 working draft for a JMU AI guideline and frames AI use in teaching and exams.

citation.citationTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie

artifacts.sourceTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Beiträge generativer KI-Werkzeuge dürfen genutzt werden, müssen jedoch klar gekennzeichnet werden. Die abgegebene Eigenständigkeitserklärung umfasst auch deren Verwendung.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The draft guideline says generative AI contributions may be used but must be clearly marked and included in the independence declaration.

citation.citationTitle: Arbeitspapier zur Erstellung einer JMU KI-Leitlinie

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Das Rechenzentrum ermöglicht den Einsatz von KI-Systemen ... Für einen verantwortungsvollen Einsatz müssen die Grundsätze sowie Vorgaben der Anbieter beachtet werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Rechenzentrum enables use of AI systems and says responsible use must observe provider principles and requirements.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Page introduction and 'Welche Möglichkeiten bieten KI-Systeme?' section

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Prompts sollen keine unveröffentlichten personenbezogenen Daten (z.B. Namen, Adressen, Telefonnummern) beinhalten. Prompts dürfen keine vertraulichen Inhalte (z.B. interne Dokumente, Geschäftsgeheimnisse) offenlegen.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Prompts should not contain unpublished personal data and must not reveal confidential content.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 'Nutzerinnen und Nutzer sind für die Eingabe der Prompts verantwortlich'

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Ergebnisse von KI-Systemen sollten grundsätzlich kritisch bewertet werden. Generative KI basiert auf statistischen Modellen ... Abhängig vom jeweiligen Fachgebiet und der konkreten Fragestellung können die Resultate daher entweder sehr hilfreich und zutreffend oder fehlerhaft und irreführend sein.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: JMU teaching guidance says AI outputs should be critically evaluated and may be helpful, faulty, or misleading depending on context.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: KI-Basics section on evaluating AI system results

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim only. It does not assert that the draft guideline is final or binding.
Approved with explicit draft-guideline scope and without treating the source as a final university-wide binding policy.
Approved as a Rechenzentrum tool-treatment and responsibility claim, not as a procurement or university-wide mandate.
Approved because the prompt restrictions are directly stated in the official Rechenzentrum page.
Approved as teaching guidance about critical evaluation of AI outputs.

artifacts.title: Julius-Maximilians-Universität Würzburg AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official JMU sources reviewed include central teaching pages for KI in Studium und Lehre, the Rechenzentrum AI tools page, and a July 2025 working draft guideline for AI in higher education practice. No final central binding AI policy was identified in the public official sources reviewed. Staged claims are limited to source status, draft-guideline transparency language, Rechenzentrum AI tool treatment, prompt/privacy restrictions, and critical evaluation guidance.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The July 2025 AI guideline source is labeled as a working draft; the staged claims do not treat it as final binding policy.
Internal or login-only exam-management materials were not accessed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
